findings.violated_requirement: Production propagation implements the declared protocol domain
findings.minimal_counterexample: if err := x.Validate(); err != nil { use(x); return nil }; use(x)
findings.expected_outcome: violation on the non-nil continuation; validation only on the matching nil edge

findings.violated_requirement: Object identity is flow-sensitive and fail closed
findings.minimal_counterexample: ret = a; _ = a.Validate(); ret = b; return ret, nil
findings.expected_outcome: violation for the unvalidated object b; historical assignment to a cannot validate the return slot

findings.violated_requirement: Unknown effects can invalidate an established property
findings.expected_outcome: blocking inconclusive because the unresolved relevant effect may invalidate x

findings.violated_requirement: Refinement evidence remains paired with its exact state and path
findings.minimal_counterexample: an infeasible validated branch and a feasible unvalidated branch join before one protected use
findings.expected_outcome: the feasible unvalidated contribution survives UNSAT discharge of the validated witness

findings.violated_requirement: Refinement evidence remains paired with its exact state and path
findings.minimal_counterexample: constraint solving derives UNSAT but the injected deadline expires before evidence acceptance
findings.expected_outcome: blocking inconclusive; late UNSAT cannot discharge the witness

findings.violated_requirement: Unknown effects can invalidate an established property
findings.minimal_counterexample: a required function or closure is absent from the on-demand SSA result
findings.expected_outcome: every dependent obligation is blocking inconclusive with a typed SSA reason

findings.violated_requirement: Object identity is flow-sensitive and fail closed
findings.minimal_counterexample: x and y with the same type flow through incompatible phi, store, interface, closure, or pointer paths before validation
findings.expected_outcome: only must-alias facts propagate; relevant may-alias ambiguity is blocking inconclusive

findings.violated_requirement: Interprocedural analysis converges through finite summaries
findings.minimal_counterexample: mutually recursive helpers carry an unvalidated object to a protected use
findings.expected_outcome: finite summary fixed point with matched returns; exhaustion remains inconclusive

findings.violated_requirement: Interprocedural analysis converges through finite summaries
findings.minimal_counterexample: exit := os.Exit; if cond { exit = returns }; exit(1); protectedUse()
findings.expected_outcome: prune only when the reaching call-site value is unambiguously no-return

findings.violated_requirement: Generic and unsupported forms preserve obligations conservatively
findings.minimal_counterexample: a type parameter has a supported primitive term plus methods, or a mixed relevant type set
findings.expected_outcome: preserve the primitive obligation or emit blocking inconclusive for unsupported relevant terms

findings.minimal_counterexample: a production route selects a legacy traversal, nil-context fallback, or unconditional validation fact
findings.expected_outcome: architecture scan fails until every alternate production authority is absent

findings.violated_requirement: Soundness evidence is complete, independent, and causal
findings.minimal_counterexample: a registered category such as unvalidated-boundary-request has no rule or required oracle layer
findings.expected_outcome: bijection validation fails for any missing, extra, stale, duplicate, or administratively owned entry

findings.violated_requirement: Soundness evidence is complete, independent, and causal
findings.minimal_counterexample: change a declared procedure, node, identity, call-site, depth, topology, or effect bound without changing the corpus
findings.expected_outcome: manifest sensitivity fails; admitted cardinality and feature census are derived from actual enumeration

findings.violated_requirement: Soundness evidence is complete, independent, and causal
findings.minimal_counterexample: the solver-core adapter agrees with the reference while source extraction or analyzer reporting is perturbed
findings.expected_outcome: end-to-end generated Go comparison detects extraction, routing, aggregation, and reporting perturbations

findings.violated_requirement: Soundness evidence is complete, independent, and causal
findings.minimal_counterexample: real analyzer output changes under package, file, worklist, map, or equivalent scheduling order while helper-sorted data remains equal
findings.expected_outcome: real normalized findings, facts, witnesses, summaries, and refinement evidence are byte-identical and fuzz targets use independent semantic properties

findings.violated_requirement: Soundness evidence is complete, independent, and causal
findings.minimal_counterexample: a guard already fails, the mutant does not compile, or unrelated output contains generic FAIL
findings.expected_outcome: non-kill unless clean preflight and post-control pass and the declared guard reports the expected semantic mismatch

findings.violated_requirement: Completion evidence is reproducible and claim accurate
findings.minimal_counterexample: a required production, counterexample, architecture, catalog, oracle, mutation, race, full-scan, or benchmark subcheck is omitted yet the aggregate target succeeds
findings.expected_outcome: gate self-tests fail on omission, empty selection, skipped integration, zero corpus/categories, non-causal mutation, or missing evidence

findings.violated_requirement: Completion evidence is reproducible and claim accurate
findings.minimal_counterexample: green commands run in the dirty development worktree without a synthetic tree identity or retained outcomes
findings.expected_outcome: all required gates pass in a clean detached worktree materialized from HEAD plus the intended diff and a complete evidence record is retained
